hero.title: A Haven of Peace in Provence
hero.subtitle: Charming B&B & Gîtes at the foot of La Montagnette

editorial.label: Our Story
editorial.title: Where Time Stands Still
editorial.p1: Nestled in the heart of Provence, Mas Saint Michel is an exceptional residence that invites inner journeying. Its century-old stones tell the story of a region shaped by sun, mistral and the passion of its people.
editorial.p2: Here, every detail has been crafted to offer you an authentic experience: carefully decorated rooms, a Provençal garden where time drifts gently, and a table where local flavors flourish.
editorial.p3: Whether you come seeking tranquility, discovery or simply the joy of being present, Mas Saint Michel welcomes you as if you were home.
editorial.quote: Mas Saint Michel is far more than an accommodation — it is an invitation to rediscover what truly matters.

footer.tagline: A haven of peace in Provence

leMas.label: Our Story
leMas.title: A Story of Passion
leMas.p1: Mas Saint Michel was born from a family's profound love for Provence and its art of living. This 18th-century residence, carefully and passionately restored, combines the charm of Provençal authenticity with modern comforts.
leMas.p2: Situated at the foot of la Montagnette, between Avignon and Arles, the mas welcomes you in an exceptional setting: flowering gardens, a peaceful pool, and the open horizon of the Alpilles as backdrop.
leMas.p3: Each room has been decorated with care, blending vintage furniture, Provençal fabrics and contemporary touches. Our philosophy: sincere hospitality, refined comfort and respect for the environment.
leMas.philosophy2: Local and seasonal products at breakfast
leMas.philosophy3: Respect for the environment and heritage
leMas.philosophy4: Tailor-made advice to discover the region
